---
title: "Robinson Block — May 22 onward"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: true
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(reticulate)
```

This block begins May 22 (afternoon).

## Exercises

- [Exercise 1: R Markdown, Automating Tasks, FASTA/FASTQ/String Processing](khaznadar_james_exercise1.html)
- [Exercise 2: dplyr and tidyr for data frames](khaznadar_james_exercise2.html)
- [Exercise 3: Plotting with ggplot2 + other useful packages](khaznadar_james_exercise3.html)
